subcodes.first_line: The plaintive cries of all created things have been raised by reason of what hath befallen the people of Bahá in the land of Yá, for verily 'Alí hath drawn nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفع حنین الاشیاء بما ورد علی اهل البهاء فی ارض یا ان علیا قد اقبل الی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
